[4 x 8 Banner Frame](https://www.banners.com/banner-stands/4-x-8-banner-frames) 5. 4 x 8 Banner Frame Hardware # 4 x 8 Banner Frame Hardware Revolutionize your banner presentation with the Sleek 4' x 8' Banner Frame Hardware – where sophistication meets impact. Make your message stand out and steal the spotlight effortlessly. This hardware is not just a frame; it's your ticket to a dynamic display that commands attention and leaves a lasting impression. ![4 x 8 Banner Frame Hardware](https://lag.azureedge.net/product-images/5c08a272-ea1a-46fd-a24d-e77da2137a28.jpg) Product: 4 x 8 Banner Frame Hardware Quantity: (Min: 1, Max: 1000) ![Loading product options](/includes/Images/loadingBar.gif) Loading product options... Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) [Add to Cart](javascript:__doPostBack\('ctl00$ctl00$ctl00$MainBody$MainBody$MainContent$Loader$ctl01$ctl00$AddProductToCart',''\)) * [Production Times](#95f87235-2327-4383-b4d2-78ef6cc36caf) * [Shipping](#99946997-e439-4848-9bbd-7abeb53e446a) * [How to Install](#8bc14ef3-66f6-4cc7-b059-d58cbe084e3b) ### Banner Frames Hardware Production Times At Banners.com, our production time ranges from seven to ten business days for our Banner Frame Hardware. \*\*\* Orders approved after 5pm CST will be processed the following business day. \*\*\* **7-10 Business Day Standard** This is our most popular turnaround option. Free and fast enough for most custom orders. Please note: the time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as shipping time. ### Shipping Information **This Product is made in our Minnesota Facility ONLY.** We offer the following shipping methods:​ * Standard (3-5 Business Days) * Three Day (3 Business Days) * Two Day (2 Business Days) * Overnight (1 Business Day) * Freight Shipping prices are determined by the weight of the package and the destination. Additional shipping charges apply to large orders and over-sized packages. If you are located outside of the Continental United States, please contact us for a shipping quote. **Banners.com ships throughout the United States and Internationally.** Please note: all international shipments must have shipping labels as well as customs documentation provided by the customers. We will only accept international shipping labels from the following carriers, USPS, UPS, and FedEx. Contact a customer service rep today for more information. \*\*Please note during peak times ground shipments may take an extra day or two to ship dependent upon production schedules as all packages with upgraded shipping do take priority. So please order early or discuss with your representative your particular needs so we can ensure that we meet your individual requirements. **Economy Shipping** If choosing economy shipping please add in additional postal information such as P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field on the checkout page to help ensure delivery. Using economy shipping can also add an additional 5 - 10 days, depending on where the package is being shipped to. ### How to Install a Lind Banner Frame ## Why Choose Banners.com? **Customer Service** Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers. **Fast Turnaround** Choose between a 1, 2, 3, or 5 day production time to complete your order on your schedule. **Quality Products** Our products are made with the finest materials available
